_about: Search category (Search, SavedSearch, SuggestedSearch, RulesAutoComplete, SearchToClean). The Search controller dispatches between V1/V2/V3 implementations at runtime based on `Feature.Search.V3.Enabled` / `V2.Enabled` configuration flags; the v2/v3 paths invoke the same dispatcher with version-specific defaults.

GET /api/v1/search.description: Free-text search across the CluedIn graph. The controller dispatches to the V1, V2, or V3 implementation depending on the `Feature.Search.V3.Enabled` / `Feature.Search.V2.Enabled` flags. Multiple overloads accept additional combinations of `type`, `dateSort`, `nameSort`, `direction`, `includePreviousFacets`, and `searchUnTokenized` — the spec exposes a single endpoint and the controller resolves the actual signature by `ExactQueryParam` matching. Response is cached for 120 seconds.

parameters.dateSort: When true, sort by modification date.
parameters.includePreviousFacets: Include facets from the previous (unfiltered) search.
parameters.includeExternalData: Include externally-sourced entities. Defaults to false.
parameters.includeUnstructuredData: Include unstructured entities. Defaults to false.
parameters.searchUnTokenized: V3 only — search the `name_untokenized` field for exact matches.

GET /api/v2/search.description: Version 2 of the entity search endpoint. Reached either explicitly via `/api/v2/search` or implicitly when `Feature.Search.V2.Enabled` is true and V3 is not. Same query parameters as `/api/v1/search`.

GET /api/v3/search.description: Version 3 of the entity search endpoint. Reached either explicitly via `/api/v3/search` or implicitly when `Feature.Search.V3.Enabled` is true. Adds the `searchUnTokenized` option and richer ranking.

GET /api/v1/search/suggest.description: Returns auto-suggest completions for a query prefix. Dispatches to V1, V2, or V3 implementation based on the `Search.V3.Enabled` / `Search.V3.AutoSuggestEnabled` / `Search.V2.Enabled` configuration flags. Returns an empty list when the query is empty.

GET /api/v2/search/suggest.description: Version 2 of the auto-suggest endpoint, used when `Search.V2.Enabled` is true and V3 is not.

GET /api/v3/search/suggest.description: Version 3 of the auto-suggest endpoint, used when `Search.V3.Enabled` or `Search.V3.AutoSuggestEnabled` is true.

GET /api/v1/entitysearch.description: Returns a paged sub-search scoped to a single root entity, optionally filtered by entity type, with date-sort options. Dispatches between V2 and V3 implementations based on `Feature.Search.V3.Enabled`.

parameters.dateSort: When true, sort by modification date.

GET /api/v2/entitysearch.description: Version 2 of the entity sub-search. Same parameters as `/api/v1/entitysearch`.

GET /api/v3/entitysearch.description: Version 3 of the entity sub-search. Same parameters as `/api/v1/entitysearch`.

GET /api/v1/dynamicfacets.description: Returns a paged entity sub-search together with dynamically computed vocabulary-key facets, for use in the entity-detail facet panel. Dispatches between V2 and V3 implementations based on `Feature.Search.V3.Enabled`.

GET /api/v2/joinsearch.description: Joined search that lets a query span related entities; results are still entity instances but ranking includes edges of related types. Available only as `/api/joinsearch` and `/api/v2/joinsearch`. Dispatches to V2 or V3 implementation when feature flags are enabled. Returns an empty response when neither V2 nor V3 is enabled.

parameters.id: Optional related entity identifier to anchor the join.

GET /api/v3/joinsearch.description: Version 3 of the joined search endpoint, used when `Feature.Search.V3.Enabled` is true.

GET /api/v1/subsearch.description: Runs a free-text search restricted to entities related to (a sub-graph of) the supplied parent entity id. Dispatches between V2 and V3 implementations based on `Feature.Search.V3.Enabled`.

GET /api/v2/subsearch.description: Version 2 of the sub-search endpoint. Same parameters as `/api/v1/subsearch`.

GET /api/v3/subsearch.description: Version 3 of the sub-search endpoint. Same parameters as `/api/v1/subsearch`.

GET /api/v1/search/id.summary: Get entity from search store by id
GET /api/v1/search/id.description: Returns the entity record stored in the search index (Elasticsearch) for the supplied id. Returns 400 for invalid GUIDs.

GET /api/v1/search/morelikethis.description: Returns entities that the search index considers similar to the supplied entity, augmented with suggested searches per hit. With the `type` parameter the similarity is restricted to one or more entity types (comma-separated). Returns 400 for invalid GUIDs.

parameters.type: Optional comma-separated list of entity types to restrict the similarity to.

GET /api/v1/search/terms.summary: Get term aggregations for a property
GET /api/v1/search/terms.description: Returns a term aggregation for a vocabulary key (property name) — the list of distinct values seen across the index and their counts. With only `id` the aggregation is run on the entity record id; with `propertyName` it targets a vocabulary key. Supports `resolveMappedKeys` to follow mapping chains. Returns 404 if the property cannot be resolved.

parameters.id: Entity identifier (when running on a single record).
parameters.size: Maximum number of buckets. Defaults to 1000.
parameters.resolveMappedKeys: When true, resolve to the destination mapped key. Defaults to false.

GET /api/v1/search/terms/paged.description: Returns paged term aggregations for a vocabulary key with optional text search inside the bucket names. Returns 404 if the property cannot be resolved and 400 when the cursor cannot be parsed.

parameters.cursor: Opaque paging cursor for the next page.
parameters.searchTerm: Optional substring search inside bucket names.
parameters.resolveMappedKeys: When true, resolve to the destination mapped key. Defaults to false.

GET /api/v1/search/facets.summary: Get facet aggregations for a field
GET /api/v1/search/facets.description: Returns Elasticsearch term aggregations for a single schema field, taking the field's `DataType` into account (IP addresses get an additional `IpRange` aggregation). Returns 404 if the field is not in the entity schema.

parameters.size: Maximum number of buckets. Defaults to 1000.
parameters.resolveMappedKeys: When true, follow mapping chains when running the aggregation.

GET /api/v1/search/count.description: **Deprecated** — always returns 0. Kept to avoid breaking older UI clients.

PUT /api/v1/search/count.description: **Deprecated** — always returns 0. Kept to avoid breaking older UI clients.

PUT /api/v1/search/clear.description: **Deprecated** — always returns 0. Kept to avoid breaking older UI clients.

GET /api/v1/search/subscribe.description: **Deprecated** — returns an empty array. Kept to avoid breaking older UI clients.

POST /api/v1/search/subscribe.description: **Deprecated** — returns the string `"Not supported"`. Kept to avoid breaking older UI clients.

POST /api/v1/search/unsubscribe.description: **Deprecated** — returns the string `"Not supported"`. Kept to avoid breaking older UI clients.

POST /api/v2/searchtoclean/checkquery.description: Internal debug endpoint that compares the Elasticsearch query produced by the `NestExpressionTranslator` and the `FilterRuleToNestConverter` for a given clean project model. Pick the translator with the `method` query parameter (`NestTranslator` or `QueryBuilder`). **Not for production use.** Requires the Preparation.Clean RACI claim.

GET /api/v1/savedsearch.description: Returns paged saved searches matching the supplied filter model. Returns 400 with validation details when the filter model is invalid.

POST /api/v1/savedsearch.description: Creates a new saved search from the supplied model. Returns 201 Created with a `Location` header pointing at the new resource. Returns 400 when the filter rule fails validation.

GET /api/v1/savedsearch/{savedSearchId}.description: Returns a single saved search by id. Returns 404 if the saved search cannot be found.

POST /api/v1/savedsearch/{savedSearchId}.description: Updates a saved search. Returns 403 if the caller does not have access to update it, 404 if it cannot be found, and 400 when the filter rule fails validation.

DELETE /api/v1/savedsearch/{savedSearchI.description: Deletes a saved search. Returns 403 if the caller does not have access to delete it and 404 if it cannot be found.

GET /api/v1/savedsearch/favorites.description: Returns the caller's favorite saved searches, paged.

POST /api/v1/savedsearch/favorites.description: Adds a saved search to the caller's favorites. Returns 201 Created with a link to the favorites list and 404 when the saved search id cannot be found.

DELETE /api/v1/savedsearch/favorites/{fa.description: Removes a favorite by id. Returns 404 if the favorite cannot be found.

GET /api/v1/suggestedsearch.description: Runs a registered related-entities query (`queryKey`) with the supplied `tokens`, returning either the matched entities (as cards augmented with suggested searches) or the related-entity paths. Returns an empty list when the `SuggestedSearches.Enabled` feature flag is off. Response is cached for 1200 seconds.

parameters.tokens: Token string consumed by the query.

GET /api/v1/ruleautocomplete/list.description: Returns auto-complete suggestions for a rule editor property — the candidate values the property is likely to take, based on the object type. Used by the rules-builder UI to power dropdowns.
